description_long: This is a two-story detached house surrounded by a rectangular fenced yard. The house features a prominent gable roof with a smaller hip roof section, and a covered front porch supported by columns. Large, multi-pane windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, providing ample natural light. The property includes a landscaped area with shrubs and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored siding with contrasting dark roofing. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century American suburban homes, blending traditional and practical elements.
description: A two-story house with a gable roof, large windows, a covered porch, and a fenced yard, featuring traditional American suburban design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, and landscaped yard with shrubs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side windows, fence, and a large open yard area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional windows, and the full extent of the fenced property.
description_view_3: Right side view with side windows, a small entryway, and the fence enclosing the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a covered porch, supported by columns, and a small set of steps leading up from the walkway.
